creator: drt360@mail.usask.ca
text:
Interestingly enough, I submitted a bug like this myself.  However, I'm not
positive but either my email address is being ignored as spam or send-pr is not
working properly for me.  Hopefully, this gets through though.  However, I did
manage to post something to the gcc people, they recommended that my memory
might be too low.  I only have about 32 mb in at the moment and I was curious
how much memory in your system do you have?  I also included a gzipped *.i file
since gcc seemed to have wanted it, i'm sure the freebsd 5 people can make use
of it as well.  I suggest you might want to give them your *.i file as well,
basically to do that all one must do is run the command with the save-temp
option as specified on the gcc site.  Hope this email was helpful.

Dave Turgeon


----- End forwarded message -----
